MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-522554 WITH CASE CGC-12-522724
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS MICHAEL STRASSER AND THINK2BUILD, LLC'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-522554 WITH CASE CGC-12-522724. The motion is granted because no opposition was filed.
